str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - problem-solving
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Not Being Able to Solve Coding Problems
entry.summary: Conquer coding anxiety with our comprehensive guide! From breaking down problems to embracing mistakes, learn 15 strategies to overcome fear, build confidence, and thrive in your coding journey. Ready to boost your problem-solving skills? Read now!

entry.title: Effective Problem-Solving Strategies for Tech Issues
entry.summary: Master the art of problem-solving in the tech industry! Explore 15 strategies to tackle challenges effectively. Enhance your skills and contribute to seamless operations in the dynamic world of technology.

entry.title: How to Learn to Code by Participating in Pair Programming
entry.summary: Discover the transformative power of pair programming! Uncover 15 key benefits, from enhanced problem-solving to skill diversity. Elevate your coding journey through collaboration and accelerate your learning curve. Plus, find answers to common pair programming questions in our comprehensive FAQ section. Don't miss out—read now and share the knowledge!
